mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time, last_login_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, avatar, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET last_login_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, nickname, role, status) VALUES
(#{user.username}, #{user.password}, #{user.email}, #{user.phone}, #{user.nickname}, #{user.role}, #{user.status})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE user SET role = #{role} WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM user WHERE id IN
#{id}
